name: Marmalade
story: Marmalade's face says he has seen things and disapproves of most of them. His purr, which starts the moment you sit down, says otherwise.
He came to us when his elderly owner moved into care. He needs daily brushing and a soft spot by a window — in exchange you get the most devoted grump in the rescue.

medical.notes: Senior bloodwork clear. Daily brushing required; groomed monthly.

photoAlt: Marmalade, a fluffy orange Persian with a magnificent grumpy face
